ideation: This animation sequence portrays a woman supervillain, emphasizing a menacing and controlling pose.  The animation will start with arms crossed, transition to a hand-on-hip pose, then to a dramatic arm-outstretched pose, and finally end with a hand-to-chin pose suggesting plotting. Each arm's movement will be deliberate and sharp, emphasizing the character's power and cunning. The robot's lack of elbows will be used to our advantage, creating a slightly unnatural, robotic feel which adds to the supervillain's menacing aura.

frames.beat: arms cross defensively, a villain's stance
arms shift, one hand on hip, the other beckons
both arms spread wide, commanding the scene
one hand rises to chin, plotting the next move
